276.reason: [The condition for detecting single '|' is incorrect: it checks `peekChar() == '|'` instead of `peekChar() != '|'`, so it fails to detect a lone '|' as an error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition for detecting single '|' is incorrect: it checks `peekChar() == '|'` instead of `peekChar() != '|'`, so it fails to detect a lone '|' as an error.]
